name: office-excel
description: Native .xlsx read/write/edit via exceljs — replaces HTML .xls fallback

tianshu.name: office-excel
tianshu.description: Native .xlsx read/write/edit — sheet/cell/formula read, 2D-array write, in-place edit, basic styles

tools.name: xlsx_read
tools.description: Read .xlsx file — list sheets, read cells/formulas as markdown table

tools.name: xlsx_write
tools.description: Write .xlsx file from 2D array data (formulas + styles)

tools.name: xlsx_edit
tools.description: Edit existing .xlsx — add sheets, update cells, append rows
